title: The Garden Awakens Skin Pack
description: Ported Java Edition skin pack to Legacy Skins + CPM
body:
**The Garden Awakens Skin Pack** is a direct port of ["The Garden Awakens (Skin pack)"](https://minecraft.net/content/dam/minecraftnet/games/minecraft/software/TheGardenAwakens_JavaSkin_PaleLumberjack-1.zip) for use with [Legacy Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins). Original textures by Mojang Studios.

![Legacy Skin's menu open up to "The Garden Awakens", which contains 2 skins, the "Pale Lumberjack", and the "Creaking Skin"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/btzz80tF/images/b7c636afc62ef5528632e06dcbe0e70b3d7ff83b.png)
